case_title: MARLIN D. DARBY VS. AMERICA EDUCATION FOUNDATION INTERNATIONAL, A CALI

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DARBY, MARLIN D. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICA EDUCATION FOUNDATION INTERNATIONAL, A CALI FORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
